text: Fixed the Material You icon not working.
Fixed SpeakThat's main screen logo's inconsistent spacing.
subpoints: The gap between Bugdroid's head and the text was slightly too big. Not a big deal at all but this one really annoyed me lol

text: Added Exclusion Text to Emoji Removal.
subpoints: You can add text under the Emoji Removal option to specify when you would like emojis to remain in the text.
This is especially useful for when someone reacts to your message. Just type “reacted”, into the text box

text: Added Keep Emojis to Conditional Rules.
subpoints: Similar in function to the exclusion text mentioned above, but baked into the Conditional Rules engine for even finer control.
